challenge: Benchmark needed an identity that signalled rigour and precision without feeling cold — a brand that could live comfortably across a complex SaaS product, print collateral, and outbound campaign work, without losing coherence.
title: A brand built on precision
solution: The identity was built on a single structural idea: the mark as measurement. A wordmark system derived from grid logic, paired with a restrained colour palette and a typographic hierarchy that scales from billboard to UI label. The design system was codified in Figma with documented tokens, making it immediately usable by the engineering team.
